aggrieve.name: Aggrieve
aggrieve.desc: Charge into melee range and attack.

affect.name: Affect
affect.desc: Declare a freeform action requiring DM input.

trapwise.name: Trapwise
trapwise.desc: Locate traps using RSN or SVY.

martial_training_c.name: Martial Training
martial_training_c.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: C

martial_training_d.name: Light Weapons
martial_training_d.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: D

martial_expertise_b.name: Martial Expertise
martial_expertise_b.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: B

martial_training_e.name: Martial Basics
martial_training_e.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: E

arcane_basics.name: Arcane Basics
arcane_basics.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: V

arcane_knowledge.name: Arcane Knowledge
arcane_knowledge.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: W

arcane_secrets.name: Arcane Secrets
arcane_secrets.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: X

knight_protector.name: Protector
knight_protector.desc: Give +100 DEF to one other party member. Bonus scales to +200 at L3 and +300 at L5. Oracle action — usable once per round.

knight_rep.name: Honorable Reputation
knight_rep.desc: When making a check to persuade an NPC, lower the DC by 2 unless they hate knights.

knight_unburdened.name: Unburdened
knight_unburdened.desc: Your dodge is not capped while wearing [Heavy] armor.

knight_resilience.name: Resilience
knight_resilience.desc: Once per day, remain at 1hp after taking lethal damage.

thief_acquire.name: Acquire
thief_acquire.desc:
DC: ? + [target FNS].
Make a finesse check to steal an unequipped item from an enemy.
thief_acquire.dm_notes:
Base DCs are usually:
500 - unequipped items
700 - held items (level 3 or higher)
900 - equipped items (level 5)
Some items may be easier or harder to steal at your discretion

thief_hide.name: Hide
thief_hide.desc:
*(you must use your oracle and move actions to use this in combat)*
You may hide on your turn. Opponents cannot target you while you are hidden. If you successfully attack while hidden, the damage bypasses your opponent's DEF, but you are no longer hidden.

thief_disarm.name: Disarm
thief_disarm.desc: You may use Acquire on an enemy's held items.

thief_slip.name: Slip
thief_slip.desc: On a successful FNS check (DC 900), gain immunity to opportunity attacks and move one range band. Consumes your move action.

thief_disarmor.name: Disarmor
thief_disarmor.desc: You may use Acquire on an enemy's equipped gear.

spellcraft.name: Spellcraft
spellcraft.desc: You can analyze the properties of a spell or ritual with a RSN check.
spellcraft.dm_notes:
Base DCs are usually:
 Rank - DC
V - 500
W - 700
X - 900
Y - 1100
Z - 1300
Some spells may be easier or harder to analyze at your discretion.

Decrease DC by 200 for each of the following:
 - Player witnessed spell being cast
 - Player has access to written record of the spell (tome, scroll, runes, magic circle, etc)
 - Player is directly affected by the spell

mage_rep.name: Distinguished
mage_rep.desc: When making a RSN check to persuade an NPC, lower the DC by 2 unless they distrust magic users.

dilettante_knack.name: Knack
dilettante_knack.desc:
You may either:
 - Make a SVY check in place of another check.
 - Use your SVY save in place of another save.
Gain an additional use at level 3, and again at level 5. Regain all uses at the end of a combat encounter.

dilettante_weapon_forte.name: Weapon Forte
dilettante_weapon_forte.desc: At the start of the day, pick a weapon you own. Use SVY in place of that weapon's normal weapon stat.
